question: How can you set anti-block shield for a multi-use pressure cooker and air fryer?
content:
To install the anti-block shield, place it over the prongs on the pressure cooking lid and press down until it snaps into position.<PIC>
Do not operate the pressure cooker without the anti-block shield installed; it keeps food particles from entering the steam release pipe and helps regulate pressure.
ret: "To install the anti-block shield, place it over the prongs on the pressure cooking lid and press down until it snaps into position.<PIC>\nDo not operate the pressure cooker without the anti-block shield installed; it keeps food particles from entering the steam release pipe and helps regulate pressure.",["Manual30_35"]

evidence_refs.note: Identifies the anti-block shield purpose and shows the component.
Gives removal/install instructions, installation image anchor, and warning not to operate without the shield installed.

notes: Question interpreted as installing or setting the anti-block shield. One image is included because the manual's installation figure shows placing the shield over the prongs and pressing it down.
